Warehouse Loading Dock.name: City Shipping — Loading Dock
Warehouse Loading Dock.description: A sprawling concrete expanse. Several massive roll-up doors are open to the elements. Forklifts sit idle, their keys still in the ignitions.
Warehouse Loading Dock.first_entry_text:
The warehouse is supposed to be operating on a skeleton crew today. The sheer scale of the place makes you feel very small.

A rhythmic, metallic banging echoes from deep inside the aisles.

furniture.name: Foreman's Desk
furniture.description: A metal desk littered with manifests and shipping manifests. A heavy ring of keys sits near the edge.

objects.name: dock radio
objects.description: A dusty radio sitting on a barrel. It's playing static that occasionally sounds like a deep, structural groan.

skin.name: Iron Pipe Wrench
skin.description: A massive pipe wrench balanced on the edge of a high shelf.

skin.name: Industrial Forklift
skin.description: A yellow forklift idling with forks raised at chest height.

skin.name: Propane Line
skin.description: A corroded propane feed line running along the wall.

Storage Aisles.name: Storage Aisles
Storage Aisles.description: A maze of towering metal racks stretching forty feet to the ceiling. The crates are stacked dangerously high, leaning ominously into the narrow aisles.

furniture.name: Medical Station
furniture.description: A bright red emergency station mounted to the wall, holding an industrial defibrillator and first aid supplies.
